name: video-01-director
description: Generate videos with specific camera movements

first_frame_image.description: First frame image for video generation. The output video will have the same aspect ratio as this image.
first_frame_image.title: First Frame Image

prompt.description: Text prompt for video generation. Camera movement instructions can be added using square brackets (e.g. [Pan left] or [Zoom in]). You can use up to 3 combined movements per prompt. Supported movements: Truck left/right, Pan left/right, Push in/Pull out, Pedestal up/down, Tilt up/down, Zoom in/out, Shake, Tracking shot, Static shot. For example: [Truck left, Pan right, Zoom in]
prompt.title: Prompt
